reason: Agent successfully opened a browser, navigated to https://example.com, retrieved the page title "Example Domain", and reported it back.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing Gamut application with sidebar containing agents
Found and clicked the "QA-20260710-195033-6f6x" agent in the sidebar — Agent page opened with session "Browser Page Title Lookup" created
Sent message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message displayed in chat and agent began processing
Waited for response — Agent completed processing in approximately 15 seconds (well under the 3-minute timeout)

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" — Response clearly states: "The page title is \"Example Domain\"" and "The page at https://example.com has the title \"Example Domain\". I've closed the browser."
